title: Undying Sigil
description: Enemies with at least as much [gold]Doom[/gold] as HP deal [blue]50%[/blue] less damage.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Reduces damage from enemies whose current HP is less than or equal to their Doom power amount. Only applies to powered attacks and only protects the relic owner.
